mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lwh_ai_processing_job (document_id, task_type, parse_engine, provider_task_id, status, progress, retry_count, result_bucket, manifest_path, markdown_path, blocks_path, error_message, next_poll_time, locked_until, worker_id, version, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{taskType}, #{parseEngine}, #{providerTaskId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{retryCount}, #{resultBucket}, #{manifestPath}, #{markdownPath}, #{blocksPath}, #{errorMessage}, #{nextPollTime}, #{lockedUntil}, #{workerId}, COALESCE(#{version}, 0), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_processing_job WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_processing_job WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'SUBMITTED', 'RUNNING', 'RETRY_WAIT', 'MATERIALIZING') AND (next_poll_time IS NULL OR next_poll_time <= #{now}) AND (locked_until IS NULL OR locked_until < #{now}) ORDER BY next_poll_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE lwh_ai_processing_job SET provider_task_id = #{providerTaskId}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_poll_time = #{nextPollTime}, locked_until = NULL, worker_id = NULL, started_at = COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE lwh_ai_processing_job SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_poll_time = #{nextPollTime}, locked_until = NULL, worker_id = NULL, started_at = COALESCE(started_at, #{startedAt}) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE lwh_ai_processing_job SET result_bucket = #{resultBucket}, manifest_path = #{manifestPath}, markdown_path = #{markdownPath}, blocks_path = #{blocksPath}, status = 'MATERIALIZING' WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE lwh_ai_processing_job SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, next_poll_time = NULL, locked_until = NULL, worker_id = NULL WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE lwh_ai_processing_job SET status = 'CANCELLED', finished_at = #{finishedAt}, next_poll_time = NULL, locked_until = NULL, worker_id = NULL WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'SUBMITTED', 'RUNNING', 'RETRY_WAIT', 'MATERIALIZING')
